commit.message:
fix: pass UDP socket info via ext_info to QUIC listeners for complete getInfo()

QUIC listeners were missing address/family details in getInfo() because
the HttpListener was created with no_bind=True (no TCP socket to query).
Pass the UDP socket info (address, address_desc, family, familystr, port,
hostname, hostname_desc) via ext_info so getListeners()/getListenerInfo()
return complete information for QUIC listeners.

commit.message:
Epic magic summoning circle loading screen

Complete redesign of the loading animation as a magical summoning circle:

Magic Circle System:
- Outer ring: Elder Futhark runes orbiting slowly (28s CW)
- Mid ring: Flowing energy arcs (gold + crimson) counter-rotating (14s CCW)
  with geometric cardinal/diagonal markers
- Inner ring: "VALDORIA LENDAS" text orbiting faster (18s CW)
- Periodic radial magic pulses expanding from center (gold + crimson)

Enhanced Particles:
- Embers (gold): 6 particles floating upward at varied speeds
- Sparks (white-gold): 4 fast-rising bright particles
- Motes (crimson): 2 laterally drifting ambient particles

Visual Effects:
- Dark vignette overlay for dramatic framing
- Dual aura layers (gold + crimson) pulsing behind circle
- Background: warm radial gradient (charcoal/burgundy tones)

Central Emblem (unchanged):
- Shield with draw-in stroke animation
- Golden compass star with glow
- Diagonal sword with traveling gleam + tip sparkle
- Dragon body curves with trace-in animation

commit.message:
fix: wait for Zeabur volume mount before initializing database

Zeabur may mount volumes after container starts. Added a wait loop
(up to 30s) to detect when the volume is actually available before
running init_db, preventing the database from being recreated on
every deployment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Ajout Pass 5 : nodules OCR-only avec volume calculé (ellipsoïde)

Quand un nodule est visible sur l'image (OCR détecte N1 + 3 dimensions)
mais n'a pas été mesuré avec l'outil Volume (pas de SR match), le système
calcule le volume par la formule ellipsoïde V = π/6 × H × W × L et
l'inclut dans le compte rendu. Cas réel : BARON YVAN N1 (RT).

commit.message:
Refactor blog: markdown pipeline → direct React components (#145)

* refactor: migrate blog from markdown pipeline to direct React components (#144)

Replace the fragile markdown-to-generated-TSX pipeline with direct React
components. Posts are now .tsx files that export metadata and render JSX,
eliminating runtime markdown parsing and triple-redundant generation scripts.

- Convert 23 blog posts from markdown to React TSX components
- New PostMeta interface and PostLayout component
- Single index generation script replaces 3 old ones
- Rewrite post-metadata.ts for dynamic TSX component imports
- Update [slug]/page.tsx to render components directly
- Delete old markdown dir, generated dir, 12 dead scripts
- Remove seo-maintenance.yml and process-transcripts.yml workflows
- Remove Article.tsx (react-markdown renderer)
- Remove hardcoded-posts.ts, frontmatter-utils.ts, processed-posts.ts
- Update build-validation tests for new architecture
- Add seo-report.json and tag-validation-report.json to .gitignore
- Net reduction of ~7,500 lines of code

Closes #144

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* reprocessing sample blog

* fix: escape apostrophes in my-first-steps-into-coding.tsx

Replace unescaped ' with ' in JSX content to fix
react/no-unescaped-entities lint error breaking the Vercel build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: update 14 blog posts with revised content and fix JSX escaping

Updated blog post content across 14 articles. Fixed " in JSX
className attributes and escaped apostrophes in text content to
pass react/no-unescaped-entities lint rule.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Let cascades finish before transitioning after enemy defeat

Previously, killing an enemy mid-cascade would immediately end the
turn, skipping remaining matches (heals, shields, gems). Now all
cascades play out fully before enemyDefeated() triggers. Attack
runes skip damage on already-dead enemies to avoid overkill effects.

  enable_globally() streams weights from CPU RAM per-op

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct plugin handshake documentation and code comments

The controller's version validation is two-level:
1. Pre-spawn config check — compares the declared interface_version in config
   against knownInterfaceVersions; rejects mismatches before spawning.
2. Transport handshake — hashicorp/go-plugin magic cookie confirms the binary
   is a valid RoboDev plugin.

The protobuf Handshake RPC is NOT called — no generated proto stubs exist.
Docs incorrectly claimed the controller calls the gRPC Handshake RPC and
verifies the version the plugin actually implements.

- host.go: rewrite LoadPlugin and startPlugin comments to accurately describe
  the two-level check and note the proto-stub limitation
- docs/api/plugins.md: stop claiming Handshake RPC is called at startup;
  explain current enforcement and what the Handshake RPC requirement means
- docs/plugins/writing-a-plugin.md: add admonition clarifying Handshake RPC
  is required for plugins to implement but not yet called by the controller

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: DHT hinted handoff for reliable value replication (v0.5.7) [BUILD]

Server-side replication was fire-and-forget — if a peer was temporarily
unreachable, values were silently lost on that node. Now:

- replicate_to_peer() returns error code with logging at each failure
- Failed replications queued to SQLite hinted handoff table (24h TTL)
- Periodic retry every 30s delivers queued frames to recovered peers
- Cap: 1000 pending entries, automatic expired entry cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v4.5.3: Fix scope precision, API key terminology, compound action detection

G2 — Scope Precision (4 false positives fixed):
- Added Check 3c: "working WITH locked tech" — when action names the
  SAME brand/tech the lock protects, modification verbs are safe
- Added "optimize" to ENHANCEMENT_VERBS for preservation locks
- Added "write tests" raw text detection for preservation locks
- Added "update" to NEUTRAL_ACTION_VERBS for verb extraction

G1 — API Key Terminology (2 misses fixed):
- Added SYNONYM_GROUPS for API keys (publishable key, secret key, etc.)
- Added CONCEPT_MAP entries for credential terms and auth providers
- Added env var preprocessing: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY → stripe secret key
- Added security pattern: placing credentials in client-side code
  is equivalent to exposing them (overrides positive-intent alignment)

G3 — Multi-Lock Compound Action (1 miss fixed):
- Added hasSecurityViolationPattern flag to prevent Check 5a/5b from
  overriding credential-exposure detection in compound actions
- Added auth0/okta/cognito/keycloak synonym group with supabase auth
- Auth0 now correctly detected as competing auth provider

All test suites passing: 61/61 adversarial, 91/91 phase4,
86/86 john, 124/124 sam, 18/18 payment, 105/111 real-world

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
